title: McDonald's is planning to replace human drive-thru order taking with AI system ArchIQ at select locations
description: McDonald’s is testing ArchIQ, an AI-powered drive-thru ordering system, at select restaurants. The company says the technology could improve speed, accuracy and operations before any broader rollout across its network.

title: Lesotho signs $6.2bn hydropower and AI project with aim of becoming power exporter
description: The agreement Lesotho signed with US-based Convalt Energy to develop a 1,200MW hydropower project and an AI data centre is valued at almost three times Lesotho's GDP.

title: Cognizant Launches Sovereign Physical AI Platform-as-a-Service
description: Establishes industry leading sovereign Physical AI Platform-as-a-Service, built on the Cognizant® Intelligence Spine Unifies Cognizant’s engineering, AI, industry capabilities for Physical AI across eight core verticals Cognizant launched an industry leading sovereign Physical AI Platform-as-a-Service, an integrated capability that moves autonomous systems from experimentation into core enterprise infrastructure. title: WWDC 2026: Siri to iOS 27, what to expect from Apple's biggest AI reset yet
description: From a revamped Siri to AI-powered features across iOS and macOS, WWDC 2026 could mark a pivotal moment in Apple's effort to catch up with rivals

title: Sioux City police get $77K grant for AI cameras
description: SIOUX CITY — The Sioux City Council will be asked Monday to authorize the police department to accept $77,250 in Byrne-Justice Assistance funds from the State of Iowa Office of Drug Control Policy Byrne — Justice Assistance Grant Program to...
